question: Convert my single-node Megatron Bridge launch into a two-node Slurm sbatch job. I need guidance on srun-native launch, container mounts, NCCL variables, and debugging timeouts.
ground_truth: The answer should use the multi-node Slurm skill, recommend the srun-native approach as the preferred pattern, explain cluster/container setup considerations, and include practical checks for NCCL timeouts and multi-node debugging. It should not default to a local single-node torchrun-only recipe.
expected_behavior: Read the nemo-mbridge-multi-node-slurm skill before answering.
Identify the task as multi-node Slurm launch conversion.
Recommend the srun-native approach unless the user explicitly needs the legacy torch.distributed path.
Mention container, mount, and environment setup considerations.
Include debugging advice for NCCL or node-communication failures.
